architecture.summary: Single-project (vskill), React SPA frontend (eval-ui) + Node HTTP backend (eval-server). No architectural changes needed -- fixes stay within existing component boundaries.

integrations.summary: Existing: credential-resolver reads process.env then .env.local. GET /api/credentials endpoint exists. writeCredential() helper exists. New: POST endpoint for saving creds, GET endpoint for reading all .env.local params.

ui-ux.summary: Issue 1: tab filter empty state fix. Issue 2: key-value editor with status badges and masked secrets in Params tab. Issue 3: type toggle in NewCaseForm, conditional integration fields, editable type in detail view. Issue 4: model selector forwarding for generate-evals.

performance.summary: N/A - bug fixes and UI additions, no performance impact. Credential reads are lightweight file I/O.

security.summary: Credential values in .env.local must be masked in UI. writeCredential already ensures .gitignore coverage. POST credential endpoint writes to local disk only (Studio is local dev tool).

edge-cases.summary: Issue 1: filtered-empty vs truly-empty distinction. Issue 2: .env.local may not exist yet, key may already exist (upsert). Issue 3: switching type on existing case preserves other fields. Issue 4: generate-evals must handle missing provider/model gracefully (fall back to current global).
